name: QuickBooks
tagline: Accounting software for small and medium businesses
description: QuickBooks by Intuit is the most widely used accounting software for small businesses. It handles invoicing, expenses, payroll, tax filing, bank reconciliation, and financial reporting — available in desktop and cloud versions.
use_cases: Your accountant already uses QuickBooks and you want seamless collaboration on tax prep and reconciliation
You need payroll, invoicing, inventory, and expense tracking managed from a single US-centric platform
You're a service business billing clients and need professional invoicing with automatic payment reminders
Your business is growing past basic spreadsheets and you need proper double-entry accounting with job costing
